synced:
[00:08.83] I got my driver's license last week
[00:11.95] Just like we always talked about
[00:15.20] 'Cause you were so excited for me
[00:18.41] To finally drive up to your house
[00:21.64] But today, I drove through the suburbs
[00:25.00] Crying 'cause you weren't around
[00:28.75] 
[00:31.84] And you're probably with that blonde girl
[00:35.12] Who always made me doubt
[00:38.48] She's so much older than me
[00:41.01] She's everything I'm insecure about
[00:44.03] Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
[00:47.92] 'Cause how could I ever love someone else?
[00:54.63] And I know we weren't perfect
[00:57.21] But I've never felt this way for no one
[01:04.45] And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
[01:14.48] Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
[01:21.10] 'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
[01:28.98] And all my friends are tired
[01:31.68] Of hearing how much I miss you, but
[01:35.25] I kinda feel sorry for them
[01:37.84] 'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do
[01:40.99] Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
[01:44.44] And pictured I was driving home to you
[01:51.11] And I know we weren't perfect
[01:54.09] But I've never felt this way for no one, oh
[02:01.05] And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
[02:10.72] I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
[02:17.92] 'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
[02:24.54] Red lights, stop signs
[02:28.08] I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
[02:34.74] Can't drive past the places we used to go to
[02:41.28] 'Cause you know I still love you, babe (ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)
[02:51.24] Sidewalks we crossed
[02:54.64] I still hear your voice in the traffic
[02:59.39] We're laughing over all the noise
[03:03.89] God, I'm so blue, know we're through
[03:07.85] But you know I still love you, babe (ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)
[03:18.14] I know we weren't perfect
[03:20.91] But I've never felt this way for no one
[03:27.73] And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
[03:37.86] Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
[03:44.35] 'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
[03:51.05] Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
[03:56.00]
plain:
I got my driver's license last week
Just like we always talked about
'Cause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today, I drove through the suburbs
Crying 'cause you weren't around

And you're probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
She's so much older than me
She's everything I'm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?

And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

And I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one, oh
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
'Cause you know I still love you, babe (ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic
We're laughing over all the noise
God, I'm so blue, know we're through
But you know I still love you, babe (ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)

I know we weren't perfect
But I've never felt this way for no one
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay now that I'm gone
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
